name: psychology
description: Analyze cognitive biases, motivational gaps, adoption barriers, emotional landscapes, group dynamics, and narrative psychology. Reveals why humans actually behave the way they do — which is usually different from how they say they behave. Usable standalone or as a meta-layer on any other plugin's output.

skills.name: psych_bias
skills.description: Identify cognitive biases affecting a decision or analysis. Names specific biases, shows how they operate in context, and provides concrete debiasing strategies.

skills.name: psych_motivation
skills.description: Analyze the gap between stated and revealed motivations. Identifies what people say they want vs. what their behavior shows they actually want.

skills.name: psych_adoption
skills.description: Analyze why people will or won't adopt a product, technology, or change through behavioral psychology. Identifies barriers, accelerators, and predicted patterns.

skills.name: psych_emotion
skills.description: Analyze the emotional landscape of a situation — what emotions are present, how they influence decisions, and what emotional needs are unmet.

skills.name: psych_group
skills.description: Analyze group dynamics — groupthink, polarization, conformity, diffusion of responsibility. How teams and organizations make decisions differently than individuals.

skills.name: psych_narrative
skills.description: Analyze the stories people tell themselves about a situation. Identifies dominant narratives, what they hide, and how to shift them.

commands.name: psych_bias_check
commands.description: Quick Bias Check — 3 most dangerous biases with debiasing actions

commands.name: psych_motivation_check
commands.description: Quick Motivation Check — stated vs. revealed motivation gap

commands.name: psych_adoption_check
commands.description: Quick Adoption Check — biggest barrier, strongest lever, predicted pattern

commands.name: psych_emotion_check
commands.description: Quick Emotion Check — primary emotion, unmet need, intelligent response

commands.name: psych_narrative_check
commands.description: Quick Narrative Check — dominant story, what it hides, better alternative
